task_completion.description: Verify that a new folder named 'Candidates' was created in BlueMail.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a folder named 'Candidates' in the left sidebar of the BlueMail application.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least 3 emails from distinct authors were moved to the 'Candidates' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the contents of the 'Candidates' folder in BlueMail. It should contain at least 3 emails, each from a different sender.

task_completion.description: Verify that a CSV file was created at /home/ga/Documents/candidates.csv with the correct headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or spreadsheet application showing a file named 'candidates.csv' (saved in /home/ga/Documents) with the first row containing exactly 'Name,Email,Topic'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the CSV file contains the extracted data for the 3 candidates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the CSV file contents. It should have at least 3 rows of data below the headers, containing the names (extracted from the 'From' header), email addresses, and original subject lines (topics) of the 3 authors.

task_completion.description: Verify that outreach emails were sent to the 3 authors with the correct subject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Sent' folder in BlueMail. There should be at least 3 emails sent with the subject 'Community Contribution Recognition'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the sent outreach emails include a personal salutation and mention the original topic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the composition or sent view of the outreach emails. The email body must include a salutation with the recipient's name (extracted from the 'From' header) and explicitly mention the original topic (subject line) of their email.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the BlueMail GUI to manage and send emails.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that BlueMail was used to create folders, move emails, and send emails. There should be no terminal windows showing IMAP/SMTP scripts or commands.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used a graphical application to create the CSV file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that a graphical text editor (like gedit) or spreadsheet app was used to create and edit the CSV file, rather than terminal commands like `echo` or `cat`.

integrity.description: Verify that the extracted data matches the actual emails.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the names, emails, and topics in the CSV and outreach emails correspond to actual emails visible in the BlueMail Inbox, not fabricated or hardcoded data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must create an email folder named 'Candidates' and move at least 3 distinct emails into it. It must create a CSV file at '/home/ga/Documents/candidates.csv' with exactly the headers 'Name,Email,Topic'. The agent must send at least 3 personalized emails with the subject 'Community Contribution Recognition' (or containing 'contribution').
